name: Track token prices on: schedule: - cron: "17 */6 * * *" # every 6 hours workflow_dispatch: {} # manual "Run workflow" button permissions: contents: write concurrency: group: token-prices cancel-in-progress: false jobs: poll-and-build: runs-on: ubuntu-latest steps: - uses: actions/checkout@v4 - uses: actions/setup-python@v5 with: python-version: "3.12" - name: Install dependencies run: pip install pyyaml pandas matplotlib - name: Fetch prices from OpenRouter run: python fetch_token_prices.py - name: Rebuild charts and summary run: python build_token_index.py - name: Commit results run: | git config user.name "token-price-bot" git config user.email "actions@github.com" git add data/token_prices.csv charts/ TOKEN_PRICE_SUMMARY.md git commit -m "token prices $(date -u +'%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')" || echo "nothing to commit" git pull --rebase origin main || true git push
